## Summary
Provide a clear and concise description of the changes proposed in this Pull Request.

## Type of Change
Please mark the option that applies:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-breaking documentation change)
- [ ] Refactoring / Chore

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue link or number)

## Test Plan
Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes (e.g., local pytest execution, docker-compose start, manual HTTP endpoint checks).

## Documentation Update
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (e.g., README, Contributing, inline comments) accordingly.
- [ ] Documentation update is not required for this change.

## Third-Party License Impact
- [ ] This change introduces or updates third-party libraries/scripts. I have checked that their licensing is compatible and updated `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` if necessary.
- [ ] No impact on third-party licenses.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
